etymology.description: äşĽ(äşĽ) ('gather') + ĺ†Š(ĺ†Š) ('book') = 'gather books' -> represent order or arrangement
etymology.interpretation: The character äľ–(lĂşn) visually combines the idea of gathering (äşĽ) with books (ĺ†Š), indicating the concept of ordering or arranging books. This visualization reflects the character's abstract meaning related to phonetic order and arrangement.
